title: Remote help video + support queue (dbg161)
description:
Customer-initiated remote help on HTTPS was still stuck on "Waiting for customer screen share…" because the admin WebRTC offer was sent before the customer finished getDisplayMedia and had tracks attached. dbg161 defers the admin offer until the customer sends an explicit screen-ready signal, queues ICE until remote descriptions are set, polls GET /remote/signals as a fallback, and re-offers on failure.

Screen capture (chat snip) now strips oklch/lab/lch CSS, sanitizes inline styles more aggressively, and falls back to capturing the support widget region when full-page html2canvas fails.

Admins get an in-app push notification toggle (not browser Push API), toast bubbles on new support requests, and a support queue sorted by request time with Pending vs "{Name} is currently helping" status.

Who is affected: OVH PipeShare/PipeSync HTTPS remote help and support queue (dbg161). SaaS unchanged until version publish.
changeLog: WebRTC: defer admin offer until customer screen-ready; ICE queue; signal poll fallback.
WebRTC: customer addTrack before answer; admin re-offer on ICE/connection failure.
Screen capture: oklch/lab/lch sanitizer + support-widget region fallback.
Admin support queue: requests by time, Pending vs helping status.
In-app support request toast toggle (HPUserPrefsSync + localStorage).
UI polish: SVG chat toolbar icons, widget/remote panel chrome.
